_comment: Curated representative test set (realistic student scenarios), not pulled from a real inbox due to time constraints ahead of the demo. Covers made-by-me, made-to-me, conditional, vague, and negative cases. Replace with genuine inbox data post-demo for a truly reliable precision number.

examples.message: Dear All, Greetings of the Day! The students who are willing to go for the Outing on 17.07.2026 should fill out the link below and submit it. An Approved/Not Approved email will be sent to all students on Thursday. Kindly fill out the Microsoft outgoing Permission Form on Time.

Dear Students, The School of Technology has launched the Acceleration Track 2026-27. Students of 3rd-year B.Tech are invited to register by filling out the registration form. Last date to complete the registration: 9th July 2026.
Hey, I'll send you my part of the ppt tonight before 9, promise.
I'll submit the internship report by Friday evening, just finishing the last section.
Sure, I'll loop in the placement cell and get back to you with the exact interview date.
Sir said he'll upload the corrected assignment scores by tomorrow.
The recruiter mentioned she'd send the offer letter once HR finishes verification.
My teammate said he'd handle the deployment part and ping me once it's live.
Once I hear back from the placement cell, I'll forward the interview slot to you.
If the professor approves the extension, I'll share the revised submission link with everyone.
We should catch up sometime after finals.
I'll try to look into it whenever I get some free time this week.
The meeting has been moved to 4 PM in the same room.
Congrats on the results, well deserved!
